title: Pataleshwar Mandir
tagline: Pataleshwar Mandir — spiritual town of Bihar

overview.short: The Pataleshwar Mandir is a Hindu Temple in the city of Hajipur, Bihar, India.
overview.description: The Pataleshwar Mandir is a Hindu Temple in the city of Hajipur, Bihar, India. Dedicated to Shiva, it is located at Jadhua Road, Hajipur. As per local folklore, it is said to have been in existence since ancient period and Lord Shiva is believed to be in the form of Lingam here. Apart from anthropomorphic images of Shiva, the worship of Shiva in the form of a lingam, or linga, is also important.

topPlaces.name: Ramchaura Mandir
topPlaces.description: The Ramchaura Mandir is a Hindu temple in the city of Hajipur, Bihar, India. Dedicated to the god Rama, it is located at Rambhadra near Helabazar.

topPlaces.name: Bari Sangat Bihar
topPlaces.description: The Bari Sangat - Helabazar is a Hindu Sangat in the city of Hajipur, Bihar, India. It is said to have been built during the reign of the Ancient Indian civilization.

topPlaces.name: Dighikala East
topPlaces.description: Dighikala East is a Gram panchayat in Hajipur, Vaishali district, Bihar. Dighikala East is a village (Now it has become a part of Hajipur Nagar Parishad.) in Hajipur block and located towards west from district headquarters Hajipur.

topPlaces.name: Dighikala West
topPlaces.description: Dighikala west is a village in Hajipur, vaishali district, Bihar state of India.

topPlaces.name: Kashipur Chakbibi
topPlaces.description: Kashipur chakbibi is a gram panchayat in Hajipur, Vaishali district, Bihar, India.

topPlaces.name: Kumar Bajitpur
topPlaces.description: Kumar Bajitpur is a village located in the Vaishali district of Bihar, East India.

topPlaces.name: Bishunpur Baladhari
topPlaces.description: Bishunpur Baladhari is a village in Hajipur, Vaishali district, in the Bihar state of India.

topPlaces.name: Vishunpur Vasant Urf Shubhai
topPlaces.description: Vishunpur vasant is a Gram panchayat in hajipur, vaishali district, bihar.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pataleshwar Mandir?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pataleshwar Mandir is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Pataleshwar Mandir?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jay Prakash Narayan Airport, Patna (15 km) and the nearest railway station is Patna Junction (11 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pataleshwar Mandir?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pataleshwar Mandir at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pataleshwar Mandir?
faq.a: Stays in Pataleshwar Mandir start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Pataleshwar Mandir?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ramchaura Mandir, Bari Sangat Bihar, Dighikala East, Dighikala West, Kashipur Chakbibi.
